long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring with Excellence Crme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with Hyaluronic Acid. 100% grey coverage from root to tip. L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme gives you a rich, deep, natural and even colour available in a wide spectrum of shades. Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair. The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The new caring gentle post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and smooths the hair to reveal its radiance. Complete your routine with the new caring lightweight mask that intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch in the shade Light Brown is an instant root concealer spray that covers grey roots in just one quick spray - whenever, wherever, and however you need. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch perfectly matches and blends in with your hair colour, all while delivering on the mantra of #GreysGoneIn3Seconds. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown takes only 3 seconds to give you a flawless root touch up. With a pinpoint micro-diffuser, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown precisely targets greys and its rich colour pigments give you perfectly blended coverage. The quick, yet thorough touch-up lasts until washed out. With its lightweight, no-transfer formula, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown delivers a perfect fix.What does the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown do?L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown is a revolutionary instant root concealer spray that flawlessly covers grey roots with a quick spray. Now, handle all your grey hair touch-ups in just three seconds with the Magic Retouch L'Oreal Paris Light Brown. Besides covering roots, it can also help to make your scalp less visible! The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown delivers rich, dark root touch ups that blend in seamlessly with your natural or coloured hair. Magic Retouch gives you a precise root touch up with a pinpoint micro-diffuser that targets your greys. The rich colour pigments by L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown give you perfectly blended coverage that gives your hair a fuller and natural look. The lightweight, no-transfer L'Oreal Paris Root Touch Up Light Brown keeps your roots darkened and comfortable until washed out.What makes it effective?The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown accurately targets grey hair to give you a precise root touch-up instantly. Magic Retouch uses a pinpoint micro-diffuser that accurately targets greys. With rich colour pigments, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown ensures that the touch up blends in seamlessly with your natural or dyed hair colour. Delivering perfect results immediately, Magic Retouch keeps you ready for all occasions in just three seconds. Its weightless, transfer-proof formula keeps your touch-up intact until washed off. Get flawless hair colour instantly with the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Light Brown.
  • Instant Root Coverage

  • Blends naturally with your colour

  • Easy Application

  • Water and heat resistant, transfer proof

  • Lasts 1 shampoo
name: Light Brown Magic Retouch Instant Root Concealer Spray

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

Experience lighening and colouring in 1 step for vibrant and intense colour, thanks to the Brilliance Luminance formula specially developed for dark hair.
The high-performance formula lightens and colours the hair in just one step and it provides you with perfect grey coverage and irressistible colour intensity for up to 10 weeks, without having to pre-lighten the hair beforehand.
The Diamond Gloss Sealer post-colour treatment contains Keratin and Apricot Kernel Oil for healthy-looking, stronger hair. It locks in the colour pigments and helps your colour stay more vibrant for longer.

  • Up to 10 weeks Colour Intensity

NEW L'Oreal Paris Preference Vivids range is our most innovative expertise in bold colours. The formula is infused with a blend of powerful pure dyes selected by our hair colour experts for ultra-vibrant colours. Achieve up to 3X shinier hair* with Preference ultra vibrant colours, featuring light reflecting dyes, for a luminous colour full of reflects. *Instrumental test The Shine Protect Conditioner is enriched with a UV filter and Vitamin E to preserve your shine for up to 8 weeks of radiant colour**.

Preference Vivid Colours is available in 7 fashion inspired shades. Shade Bright Red was inspired by the famous, bright and authentic red Moulin Rouge, located at the bottom of Montmartre hill. Create your own look with this vivid Bright Red colour. Made for all hair types, the formula comes in a gel texture and 150ml mix kit to provide an easy and even application.*Instrumental Test** If the shine protect conditioner is applied weekly

  • Up to 8 weeks**of radiant colour (**if the shine protect conditioner is applied weekly).

  • Available in 7 high impact, bold fashion colours.

Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

RELIEVES SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH SEBORRHOEIC DERMATITIS: Helps relieve symptoms associated with Seborrhoeic dermatitis. Helps control symptoms associated with Tinea versicolor (a condition that can cause skin discolouration) and as an adjunct in the treatment of tinea capitis (ringworm of the scalp).

This plant-powered volumising dry shampoo is enriched with 100% Organic Flax to naturally lift and support fine, flat hair from the roots. A breakthrough, clean formula that is proven to add long-lasting volume for up to 8 hours*.

Driven by a unique combination of flax fiber and highly absorbent and texturising powders, this dry shampoo cleans hair without water in just 2 minutes. Dull and lifeless hair is left easier to style and instantly clean** for improved next day hair and next day volume! Delivering an invisible finish with no white residue, this volumiser is your blowdry's best friend, naturally.

Clean formula with no nasties, such as silicones, sulfates and parabens. Eco-designed in 100% recyclable can. Save 500L of water a year by replacing 1 hair wash with 1 application of Klorane dry shampoo per week1!

PROVEN EFFICACY:
  • Long-lasting volumising effect for up to 8 hours*

    We chose Flax fiber, a light and delicate plant, for its high mucilage content, a true natural reinforcement, which naturally strengthens and volumises hair from the root. We harvest flax seeds in the southwest of France, in compliance with organic farming standards. We collect them at full ripeness, when the wind makes them rattle in their shell-like small bells.

    * Evaluation of the immediate and long-lasting efficacy on hair volume, 10 styling heads after a single application for 8hrs.
    ** Consumer use test, on 66 subjects for 3 weeks
    1. LCA - Life Cycle Analysis replacing one liquid shampoo by a dry shampoo per week.

This is not your regular dry shampoo: thanks to the addition of CeramideLIKE, this is skincare for your scalp. Excess oil, sweat and odours are absorbed on the scalp and hair, leaving it purified, volumised and revitalised for up to 12 hours*.


The natural dry shampoo absorbs excess oil to extend the life of the hair between washes, with fine powders that leave an invisible finish on all hair types. It provides texture without weighing the hair down or leaving it feeling stiff, lifting at the roots for a soft and light, radiant look*. It instantly cleanses without causing irritation, stinging or itching sensations, removing bad smells from the hair and scalp1. In just two minutes the hair becomes fresh and radiant with a soft feel*. The hair is easy to style and detangle*.

MULTI BENEFIT FORMULA
-Cleanses: gently cleanses without water by absorbing excess oil thanks to the natural powders
-Repairs: repairs damage of the hair cuticle and strengthens the hair fibre
-Protects: protects the scalp from external aggressors
-Provides texture without weighing the hair down or leaving any residue
-Supports styling by keeping hair in place for longer
-Suitable for all hair types and tinted for dark hair
-Light floral fragrance
-Free from animal origin ingredients
-99% natural origin ingredients
-Recyclable aluminium can & plastic cap

*Consumer Use Test - Dry Shampoo. 78 users for 21 days aged 18 to 60 years.
**Consumer Use Test Australia - Dry Shampoo, 21 users for 14 days.

long_description:
Klorane Dry Shampoo with Oat and CeramideLIKE is not your regular dry shampoo: thanks to the addition of CeramideLIKE, the new formula provides added benefits: protection of the scalp & repair of the hair. Excess oil, sweat and odours are absorbed on the scalp and hair, leaving it purified, volumised and revitalised for up to 12 hours*.


The dry shampoo absorbs excess oil to extend the life of the hair between washes, with fine powders that leave an invisible finish on all hair types. It provides texture without weighing the hair down or leaving it feeling stiff, lifting at the roots for a soft and light, radiant look*. It instantly cleanses without causing irritation, stinging or itching sensations, removing bad smells from the hair and scalp*. In just two minutes the hair becomes fresh and radiant with a soft feel*. The hair is easy to style and detangle*.
The Dry Shampoo with Oat and CeramideLIKE is also available in a tinted version for dark hair.

MULTI BENEFIT FORMULA
-Cleanses: gently cleanses without water by absorbing excess oil thanks to the natural powders
-Repairs: repairs damage of the hair cuticle and strengthens the hair fibre
-Protects: protects the scalp from external aggressors
-Provides texture without weighing the hair down or leaving any residue
-Supports styling by keeping hair in place for longer
-Suitable for all hair types and tinted for dark hair
-Light floral fragrance
-Free from animal origin ingredients
-99% natural origin ingredients*

long_description:
TRESemme Heat Defence Hair Spray is a specially formulated hair spray designed to protect your hair from the damaging effects of heat and friction. It's an essential product for anyone who regularly uses straighteners or curling tongs in their hair styling. This haircare spray is heat activated, kicking into action when in contact with higher temperatures, helping to guard your hair against harsh hair-styling damage. Formulated with a unique blend of ingredients that work together, our heat protection system leaves your hair looking smooth, shiny and enviably soft.

To use TRESemme Heat Defence Hair Spray, start by washing your hair with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner. After towel-drying your hair, spray our Heat Defence spray liberally, making sure to cover all your hair evenly. Then, comb the product through so it's evenly distributed. Finish styling with your favourite TRESemme hair spray.

At TRESemme, we're passionate about helping you feel confident and attractive every day. That's why we're dedicated to creating salon-quality haircare products that are accessible to everyone. Our products are inspired by stylists and tested in salons, so you can trust we'll help you achieve gorgeous salon-look hair every day. We believe that everyone deserves to look and feel fabulous, which is why we're committed to creating high-quality products that deliver results without the salon price tag.

For more tips and tricks from our professional stylists and more information on TRESemme styling appliances and tools, visit our website.
  • TRESemme Heat Defence Hair Spray is a hair styling product that protects your hair from heat and friction

  • Our haircare products protect your hair from damage caused by straighteners and curling irons, while nourishing and strengthening

  • TRESemme hair spray provides heat protection and leaves hair looking shiny and feeling incredibly soft

  • Our professional-quality defence spray is heat activated to protect your hair from harsh styling damage

  • For best styling results, use with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner

  • Our Heat Defence spray is made in Australia and PETA approved.

Our Philosophy: From our origins in Salons in 1948, TRESemme has been driven by a simple truth: every woman deserves to look & feel fabulous, like they've just stepped out of the salon. long_description:
Brylcreem has long been famous for the timeless slicked back look that keeps hair perfectly in place. But it's got even more going for it. One small dab and it shines, styles and conditions hair. It's 3 grooming products in 1. Saving you time and counter space. Protein Enriched Brylcreem leaves hair strong and healthy looking keeping it well-groomed all day. For external use only. How to use: Lightly dampen your hair then massage in just a dab of Brylcreem to style and condition your hair. To get an iconic swept back look, use a comb to keep hair looking smart. For a more textured look, work into your hair with your fingertips. Create your desired style and allow to dry naturally. For any questions or comments, dial 1800 061 (Australia) or 0800108806 (New Zealand) for a free call. An icon since 1928, Brylcreem was an instant hit with British soldiers during WWII. It quickly became standard issue for military pilots, who had a reputation for being cutting edge and sophisticated, to keep their longer hair perfectly in place during intense air battles.Through the decades the look has stuck. From slick 50's ad execs to today's red carpet. 89 years later, the look continues to be an icon of men's style. Brylcreem is a men's hair styling cream that conditions and leaves hair soft, healthy and manageable. Brylcreem can be used daily and has a three-year shelf life.

In 1955, hairdresser to the stars Alberto and a talented chemist changed the world of hair care forever with the introduction of Alberto VO5. Originally created in Culver City, CA as a conditioning hairdressing for Hollywood leading ladies to offset the harsh conditions of movie sound stages, VO5 quickly became a favourite in households across the country. The name VO5 comes from the 5 Vitamin Oils that are included in every product and are essential for healthy, beautiful hair. In only a few short years, VO5 became the number one hair care brand in its category, and still remains a favourite today. Since the launch of the original hairdressing product, Alberto VO5 expanded their hair care line to include shampoos, conditioners and styling products that are a trusted staple for families. Visit our website for our full range of products such as hairspray, styling products, wax, mousse, hair treatment, heat protect sprays, flexible paste, styling gel and many more variants.

long_description:
Powered by Pro Lock Tech, TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray achieves maximum hold without stiffness, so hair still feels flexible. With a hold level of 4 out of 5, this humidity-resistant styling spray locks in moisture and locks out frizz, giving you the extra control and grip you need to tame flyaways. Its fast-drying, water-free formula leaves no sticky residue and brushes out easily, helping you wear your hair however you want and achieve a style that stays in place all day. For best results, prep your hair with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner. To apply TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray, shake the can thoroughly before spraying evenly on dry hair from 20 to 30 cm away, one section at a time. For a stronger hold, layer more coats just where you want more control. For the ultimate body and fullness, flip your hair upside down and spray all over to set. Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve salon-gorgeous hair every day. These are salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, go to our website.
  • TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray achieves maximum hold with extra flyaway control

  • This fast-drying, water-free hair product provides a flexible hold, keeping your style in place all day

  • Our hairspray has a hold level of 4 out of 5 so you can tame flyaways and create a smooth, brushable finish

  • This styling product gives professional-quality staying power without feeling stiff or sticky

  • Shake the can thoroughly before use, then apply TRESemme hairspray evenly, holding the can 20-30 cm away from hair

  • Our hair styling spray is made in Australia and PETA approved.

long_description:
Long lasting Firm hold, that brushes our easily for all day firm hold. Long lasting firm hold that brushes out easily for an all day hold. We all want to express our true personality and we know that hair matters. Good hair days give confidence, which makes you the best you can be to those around you. VO5 brings you a full array of hair products and expertise to help you achieve your personal look. We have trusted high quality products, designed to achieve hair that looks and feels the way you want. We can give you the latest trend-led innovations that help you express yourself and your style. VO5 has the products and expertise to help you confidently create the hairstyles that express the very best of you. In 1955, hairdresser to the stars Alberto and a talented chemist changed the world of hair care forever with the introduction of Alberto VO5. Originally created in Culver City, CA as a conditioning hairdressing for Hollywood leading ladies to offset the harsh conditions of movie sound stages, VO5 quickly became a favourite in households across the country. The name VO5 comes from the 5 Vitamin Oils that are included in every product and are essential for healthy, beautiful hair. In only a few short years, VO5 became the number one hair care brand in its category, and still remains a favourite today. Since the launch of the original hairdressing product, Alberto VO5 expanded their hair care line to include shampoos, conditioners and styling products that are a trusted staple for families. Visit our website for our full range of products such as hairspray, styling products, wax, mousse, hair treatment, heat protect sprays, flexible paste, styling gel and many more variants.

long_description:
Looking to achieve flawless, frizz free curls? Look no further than VO5 Curl Defining Hair Mousse. Designed to be used before air-drying, this curling mousse helps control frizz and provides all-day definition and hold, enhancing your hair's natural shape. Containing heat-defence properties, our mousse also helps protect your hair from damage whilst hair drying and heat styling. To create natural bounce with less frizz, shake the product well, turn it upside down and press the nozzle to dispense the desired amount of mousse into the palm of your hand. Use your fingers to comb through towel-dried hair from mid-lengths to tips and tease curls into place. Style Tip: Tip your head upside down and apply the mousse to your flipped hair to add more volume and ensure even distribution. For a smooth, glossy finish, pair this curling mousse with VO5 Frizz Free Cream. VO5 is here for your everyday hair styling wants and needs. We have a part to play to give you a better hair day, every day. If you like the VO5 Curl Defining Hair Mousse, be sure to check out the rest of our Enhance range to achieve the smoothest, glossiest frizz free finish. Don't forget to leave a product review and to keep up to date with all things VO5, make sure to follow us on social!
  • VO5 Curl Defining Hair Mousse hydrates curly hair and gives it all-day definition and hold, helping you create bouncy, frizz free curls that last

  • The formula of our curling mousse contains heat-defence properties, protecting against damage caused by heat-styling tools

  • Take the fight out of looking just right and show your style and yourself to the world with VO5 Curl Defining Hair Mousse

  • For a super sleek finish and enhanced heat protection, pair our hair styling mousse with VO5 Frizz Free Cream

long_description:
With a hold level of 5 out of 5, TRESemme Freeze Hold Hairspray fully secures your look in a flash while leaving no sticky residue. Its fast-drying, water-free formula assures humidity resistance for 24 hours, helping you achieve a style that stays in place all day. Whether you're opting for a straight, curly or wavy look, or you're looking to ensure your updos won't fall flat, this styling spray provides a long-lasting finish without stiffness, so hair still feels flexible. For best results, prep your hair with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner. To apply TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray, shake the can thoroughly before spraying evenly on dry hair from 20 to 30 cm away, one section at a time. For a stronger hold, layer more coats just where you want more control. For the ultimate body and fullness, flip your hair upside down and spray all over to set. Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve salon-gorgeous hair every day. These are salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, go to our website.
  • TRESemme Freeze Hold Hairspray fully secures your look, creating a long-lasting, brushable finish

  • This fast-drying, water-free hair product provides 24-hour humidity resistance, keeping your style in place all day

  • Our hairspray has a hold level of 5 out of 5 so you can tame flyaways and freeze your look in a flash

  • This styling product gives professional-quality staying power without feeling stiff or sticky

  • Shake the can thoroughly before use, then apply TRESemme hairspray evenly, holding the can 20-30 cm away from hair

  • Our hair styling spray is made in Australia and PETA approved.
name: Hairspray Salon Finish Freeze Hold

Nettle: shown to reduce excess oil and protect against oxidative stress3. Proven to cleanse and rebalance the scalp condition and hair. Vitamin E: skin-care ingredient with powerful antioxidant properties to revitalise and protect the scalp and hair fibre from oxidative stress. This product has been carefully crafted with a balanced combination of ingredients, including a selection of 100% plant-based powders, to absorb excess sebum on the scalp and refresh and cleanse the hair.Vitamin E: skin-care ingredient with powerful antioxidant properties to revitalise and protect the scalp and hair fibre from oxidative stress.
long_description:
Break the daily wash cycle! Klorane Oil Control Dry Shampoo with Nettle & Vitamin E leaves oily hair feeling refreshed and lifted, reducing the constant need to wash hair everyday which can cause the scalp to produce even more oil!

The dry shampoo provides 24 hour oil control2, thanks to the unique combination of key ingredients: Nettle and Vitamin E. It works to absorb excess oil and reduces excess sebum by 85%2, purifying the hair and lifting from the roots. It refreshes the hair and allows you to space out washes, helping to break the cycle of oily hair and scalp. It also provides volume, texture, and softness to the hair without weighing it down. It is both a styling tool and convenient oily hair solution as it does not irritate the scalp, reduces scalp odour, and extends the life of your hair style and colour. The Nettle Dry Shampoo is also available in a tinted version for dark hair.


MULTI BENEFIT FORMULA
-Cleanses: gently cleanses without water to refresh hair between washes
-Oil Control: manages oil by reducing excess sebum production
-Purifies: purifies the hair and scalp and lifts from the roots
-Provides texture without weighing the hair down or leaving it feeling stiff
-Leaves hair soft, supple and light
-Keeps colour brighter for longer
-Supports styling by keeping hair fresh and in place for longer
-Free from animal origin ingredients
-99% natural origin ingredients*
-Recyclable aluminium can & plastic cap

  • Powerful Oil Control Dry Shampoo - Clinically proven to reduce excess sebum by 85%* in one use

  • Refresh & Clarify the Scalp Without Water - Absorbs oil and lifts roots for 24-hour* freshness

  • 99% Natural Origin Formula - Powered by Nettle & Vitamin E for added care for the scalp

  • Helps break the Daily Wash Cycle - Keeps hair cleaner for longer so you can prolong the time between washes

  • Adds Volume & Texture - Lightweight formula leaves hair soft, fresh, and lifted with no white residue

  • Comes in a Tinted Dry Shampoo Formula for Dark Hair.

If you like the VO5 Mega Hold Hair Mousse, be sure to check out the rest of our hair care and styling range for more ways to lock your look and enhance your hair volume. description: NITWITS HEADLICE ALL IN ONE TREATMENT SPRAY120ML
ingredients: Dimethicone, Lauryl Alcohol, Decyl Alcohol, Myristyl Alcohol, Fragrance (Parfum).
long_description:
It's surprisingly easy to treat head lice and their eggs with no need to comb! NitWits All-In-One Spray, with key active ingredient Dimethicone, is effective in killing lice and eggs in one go*.

NitWits All-In-One Head Lice Solution is the latest NitWits innovation that delivers a quick and easy way to kill head lice AND their eggs without the need for rigorous combing.

The unique formula contains a key active ingredient called dimethicone which has shown great results in killing both head lice and their eggs quickly. With no need to repeat the application, managing head lice is now easier than ever*.

NitWits All-In-One is a sensitive formula that comes in an easy, no mess spray applicator.
  • KILLS LICE & EGGS IN ONE GO: It's easy to treat head lice and their eggs with no need to comb! Hair should be checked again after seven days to ensure that no head lice are present as eggs take around 7 days to hatch, if lice are detected, repeat treatment.

  • 20 MINUTE FAST ACTION FORMULA: NitWits All-In-One delivers a quick and easy way to kill head lice AND their eggs without the need for rigorous combing. The unique formula contains a key active ingredient called Dimethicone which has shown great results in killing both head lice and their eggs quickly.

  • Cover shoulders with a towel. Unlock spray nozzle. Onto dry hair, and holding the spray applicator approximately 10cm from the hair, spray to evenly cover the hair and scalp until the hair is saturated. Massage the solution into the scalp for 5 minutes. Leave in hair for 20 minutes. Use the comb provided to remove the dead lice and eggs. Wipe the lice and eggs off the comb and onto a tissue. Rinse thoroughly. Follow with regular shampoo routine.

  • CHILD-FRIENDLY SCENT: NitWits All-In-One Spray uses a kid friendly fragrance and is gentle on young skin. Effective on all types of hair.
name: Headlice All In One Treatment Spray

description: QUITNITS COMPLETE HEAD LICE TREATMENT KIT 325ML
long_description:
Introducing the Quitnits Complete Headlice Kit - your ultimate, all-in-one solution for treating head lice. This comprehensive kit includes everything you need to tackle head lice and nits with ease and confidence and includes a treatment spray, a nourishing conditioning shampoo, and a stainless steel comb.

Quitnits Spray Treatment: Treat head lice, eggs, and nits with the quick-to-use Quitnits Spray Treatment. This scientifically backed, pesticide-free formula is packed with 99% naturally derived ingredients, making it an ideal choice for those seeking an effective head lice treatment.

Conditioning Shampoo: Complementing the treatment spray, our Quitnits Conditioning Shampoo leaves your hair feeling soft, smooth, and manageable. Free from harsh chemicals, this gentle formula is safe for daily use on all hair types. With a pleasant, mild scent, it provides a soothing and comfortable experience for everyone in the family.

Stainless Steel Comb: The kit also features a high-quality stainless steel comb, designed to effectively remove lice and their eggs. With 100% stainless steel teeth and soft, rounded ouchless tips, this comb ensures a gentle experience for your scalp.

  • Fast acting formula
  • Easy to apply
  • Scientifically backed
  • 99% Naturally derived ingredients
  • Dermatologically tested
  • Suitable for use during pregnancy and breastfeeding
  • No pesticides or insecticides
  • No genetically modified ingredients


QUITNITS is a head lice treatment that kills lice and eggs by suffocation. For external use only. Read instructions before use. Not for daily use. If symptoms persist, contact a healthcare professional. Do not use on children under 6 months. Use with adult supervision. Keep out of reach of children. Conduct a skin patch test if you have sensitive skin. Avoid use if allergic to ingredients. Do not combine with scalp treatments without medical advice. Avoid eyes and do not swallow.
name: Complete Head Lice Treatment Kit

long_description:
A wake-up call for your hair!

Our Detox for Men shampoo formula, with Eucalyptus and Vitamin B5, is ideal for frequent use - meaning you can have clean and fresh hair every day. Sunsilk gives you shiny, manageable hair in 1 wash

HOW TO USE
Ready? Massage onto wet hair and then rinse thoroughly. Repeat application and use daily.

We'll be honest: today, we have a wider range of possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the full. And we want to be beautiful when we do that, don't we? Out here, in the real world, our life is rather hectic and we need our hair to be beautiful and to stay that way despite all the twists and turns. This is where Sunsilk comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each shampoo and conditioner bottle, you can count on us to hit the mark in this endeavour. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. long_description:
Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Conditioner helps you achieve a softer and smoother look* without weighing your hair down. Our exclusive, non-greasy formula is enriched with camellia and coconut oils to provide deep nourishment and seal in moisture while leaving behind a beautiful 48-hour scent**. Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk conditioner comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover. After shampooing with Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Shampoo, massage Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Conditioner through lengths and ends, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily to nourish and soften your hair from root to tip. *With use of Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo. **Up to 48-hour fragrance.
  • Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Conditioner is specially designed to give you softer and smoother-feeling hair*

  • Our exclusive conditioner formula seals in moisture without feeling greasy

  • Enriched with camellia and coconut oils, this conditioner deeply nourishes your hair from root to tip while leaving behind a 48-hour fragrance**

  • Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Conditioner is both paraben and dye free for the hair care you deserve

  • Sunsilk shampoo and conditioner bottles are made with 25% recycled plastic

  • At Sunsilk, we believe in supporting and inspiring girls everywhere by giving them hair ready for all possibilities.

TRESemme Moisture Rich Shampoo is enriched with vitamin E and jojoba oil to deliver intense moisturisation with 5-in-1 benefits: shiny, smooth, soft, manageable and healthy-looking hair. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this nourishing formula is light enough for daily use, with a moisture-balanced system that transforms dry and damaged hair into silky-soft locks.

For best results, apply our shampoo to wet hair, lather and rinse thoroughly. Follow with TRESemme Moisture Rich Conditioner - applying from root to tip to detangle and nourish - then finish with your favourite styling products.

Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, the products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. Our bottles are made in Australia, with 50% Australian recycled plastic and they're recyclable. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, visit the TRESemme website.

long_description:
Did you know that hair is made of 90% protein? Daily damage strips this protein away. That's why Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo is formulated with patented Bio-Protein Care technology, backed by 10 years of research. The technology delivers 1 trillion molecules of a key amino acid, the same amino acid that makes up the protein most lost due to hair damage. This helps repair the hair from the inside, leaving hair stronger, smoother and healthier-looking with every wash. Part of our Damage Therapy system, this shampoo protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage. More bounce, more life! Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner helps your hair grow longer and reduces breakage so you can enjoy your hair at its longest. Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, our exclusive conditioner formula gives your hair more body and bounce. Biotin for hair? Yes! It helps promote hair growth while sunflower oil helps hydrate your hair. It's a winning combination. Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk conditioner comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover. After shampooing, massage Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner through lengths and ends, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for longer and healthier-looking hair. Use together with our Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo to give your hair the body and bounce to turn heads. *Due to less breakage vs non-conditioning shampoo. With use of Sunsilk Longer & Stronger Shampoo and Conditioner.

long_description:
Did you know that hair is made of 90% protein? Daily damage strips this protein away. That's why Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Conditioner is formulated with patented Bio-Protein Care technology, backed by 10 years of research. The technology delivers 1 trillion molecules of a key amino acid, the same amino acid that makes up the protein most lost due to damage. This helps repair the hair from the inside, leaving hair stronger, smoother and healthier-looking with every wash. Part of our Damage Therapy system, this conditioner protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of hair damage. Made with glutamic amino serum, the formula works at a molecular level to repair damaged hair and deeply nourish its natural structure, resulting in 10x stronger hair fibres*. After shampooing with Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo, apply and massage, leave on for 1 min and rinse. For best results, follow with Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Mask and Serum. At Dove, we believe no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, we've been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we'll have helped a quarter of a billion through our educational programs and resources. *When using Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo.

  • Get up to 10x stronger hair* with Dove Damage Therapy Intensive Repair + Ceramide Conditioner

  • Made with glutamic amino serum, a key amino acid naturally found in hair

  • This conditioner for damaged hair features Bio-Protein Care technology backed by 10 years of research

  • Protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage

  • Use with Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo, Mask and Serum for best results against hair damage

  • Our hair care products are PETA-Approved Vegan and we do not test on animals anywhere in the world.
name: Damage Therapy Conditioner Intensive Repair

long_description:
Shine on! Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo makes your hair shiny, silky and glossy from root to tip*. Enriched with pearl extract and almond oil, our exclusive shampoo formula works to bring out your hair's natural shine and give you the confidence you need to face anything.

Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the full. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk shampoo comes in.

Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

Simply massage onto wet hair and then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for a perfect, addictive shine that you won't want to go without. Use together with our Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine conditioner for a shine that won't quit!

*With use of Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo.
  • Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo is specially designed to help you enjoy shiny, silky hair from root to tip*

  • Our exclusive shampoo formula activates your hair's natural shine, so you can feel more confident with wonderfully glossy hair

  • Enriched with pearl extract and rich almond oil, this shampoo nourishes and smooths your hair to bring out its natural shine

  • Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo is both paraben and dye-free for the hair care you deserve

  • Sunsilk shampoo bottles are made with 25% recycled plastic

  • At Sunsilk, we believe in supporting and inspiring girls everywhere by giving them hair ready for all possibilities.

long_description:
More bounce, more life! Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner helps your hair grow longer and reduces breakage so you can enjoy your hair at its longest. Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, our exclusive conditioner formula gives your hair more body and bounce. Biotin for hair? Yes! It helps promote hair growth while sunflower oil helps hydrate your hair. It's a winning combination.

Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk conditioner comes in.

Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

After shampooing, massage Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner through lengths and ends, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for longer and healthier-looking hair. Use together with our Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo to give your hair the body and bounce to turn heads.

*Due to less breakage vs non-conditioning shampoo. With use of Sunsilk Longer & Stronger Shampoo and Conditioner.
  • Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner is specially designed to help you enjoy long and healthy-looking hair from root to tip

  • Our exclusive conditioner formula helps hair grow longer while reducing breakage so you can get the wonderful long hair you've always wanted

  • Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, this conditioner gives your hair more body and bounce

  • Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner is both paraben and dye free for the hair care you deserve

  • Sunsilk shampoo and conditioner bottles are made with 25% recycled plastic

  • At Sunsilk, we believe in supporting and inspiring girls everywhere by giving them hair ready for all possibilities.

Shine on! Sunsilk's exclusive conditioner formula, with Pearl Extract & Almond Oil, works to bring out your hair's natural shine! To use, apply after every shampoo. We make hair products you will enjoy trying, exploring, dreaming and discovering. We'll be honest: today, we have a wider range of possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the full. And we want to be beautiful when we do that, don't we? Out here, in the real world, our life is rather hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and to stay that way despite all the twists and turns. This is where Sunsilk comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us to hit the mark in this endeavour. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

TRESemme Moisture Rich Conditioner is enriched with vitamin E and jojoba oil to deliver intense moisturisation with 5 in 1 benefits: shiny, smooth, soft, manageable and healthy-looking hair. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this nourishing formula is light enough for daily use, with a moisture-balanced system that transforms dry and damaged hair.

For best results, use our moisturising conditioner after shampooing with TRESemme Moisture Rich Shampoo. Apply through hair, running a wide tooth comb or fingers from root to tip to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly before styling with your favourite TRESemme products.

Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, the products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. Our bottles are made in Australia, with 50% Australian Recycled Plastic and are recyclable. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, visit the TRESemme website.
  • TRESemme Moisture Rich Conditioner is specially formulated for dry and damaged hair, delivering intense moisturisation to keep hair looking healthy

  • Features 5-in-1 benefits: shiny, smooth, soft, manageable and healthy-looking hair

  • Enriched with vitamin E and jojoba oil to transform dry hair into silky, salon-quality locks

  • Our professional-quality conditioner contains no parabens, alcohol or dyes

  • For best results, use after TRESemme Moisture Rich Shampoo, applying from root to tip to detangle and nourish dry hair

  • Our moisturising conditioner is made in Australia and PETA approved.

long_description:
TRESemme's Smooth & Silky Conditioner is specially formulated for dry, frizz-prone hair, leaving it 2x smoother* and salon-soft. Enriched with sunflower seed oil and vitamin A, our conditioner tames unruly hair and delivers intense moisturisation where your hair needs it most. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this conditioner is light enough for daily use.

For best results, use after shampooing with TRESemme Smooth & Silky Shampoo. Apply through hair, running a wide tooth comb or fingers from root to tip to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly before styling with your favourite TRESemme products.

Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, the products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. Our bottles are made in Australia, with 50% Australian Recycled Plastic and are recyclable. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, visit the TRESemme website.

*TRESemme Smooth & Silky System vs. non-conditioning shampoo.
  • TRESemme's Smooth & Silky Conditioner helps with frizz control and makes hair 2x smoother*

  • Specially formulated for dry, frizz-prone hair, our conditioner delivers intense moisturisation where your hair needs it most

  • Enriched with sunflower seed oil and vitamin A to moisturise unruly hair and leave it salon-soft

  • Our professional-quality conditioner contains no parabens, alcohol or dyes

  • For best results, use after TRESemme Smooth & Silky Shampoo, applying from root to tip to calm frizz

  • Our moisturising conditioner is made in Australia and PETA approved.

Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk Coconut Hydration Shampoo comes in. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

long_description:
TRESemme's Volume & Fullness Shampoo is specially formulated for fine and thinning hair, keeping hair bold and full of bounce all day long. Enriched with multi-vitamins and coconut oil, this lightweight formula transforms flat locks - building volume, fullness and lift for 24-hour body. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this shampoo rinses out completely without build-up, for a weightless salon-fresh style and healthy-looking hair.

For best results, apply our shampoo to wet hair, lather and rinse thoroughly. Follow with TRESemme Volume & Fullness Conditioner - applying from root to tip to detangle and nourish - then finish with your favourite styling products.

Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. Our bottles are made in Australia, with 50% Australian recycled plastic and they're recyclable. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, visit the TRESemme website.
  • TRESemme Volume & Fullness Shampoo is specially formulated for fine, flyaway hair, helping build volume, fullness and lift

  • Our lightweight formula rinses out completely without build-up, delivering 24-hour body and a weightless salon-fresh style

  • Enriched with multi-vitamins and coconut oil for healthy-looking hair

  • Our professional-quality shampoo contains no parabens, alcohol or dyes

  • For best results, use before TRESemme Volume & Fullness Conditioner, applying thoroughly to wet hair

  • Our shampoo is made in Australia and PETA approved.

TONI&GUY Purple Shampoo and Conditioner system fights against brassy hair tones and brightens bleached hair. It has a brilliant effect on unruly hair and will leave hair shiny and soft. The violet dye helps colour correct yellow and brassy hair tones and helps keep your hair vibrant and shiny. On the colour wheel, purple is opposite yellow. This is why purple pigments neutralise yellow and brassy tones in blonde, silver and grey hair. This exclusive formula, with Pearl Extract, also helps boost shine.^ Massage onto wet hair from root to tip. Leave the conditioner in your hair for 2-5 minutes and rinse thoroughly. For greater results, apply after using TONI&GUY Purple Shampoo. At Toni&Guy, we believe that you shouldn't have to choose between hair that looks great & hair that feels healthy. That's why we've harnessed our 50 years of salon experience to create an expertly-crafted range of products that are as hard-working, multitasking & discerning as you are. So no matter how you style or colour your hair & no matter where your day takes you, your hair will always look strong, feel healthy & be salon approved. Strengthen, refresh, hydrate, nourish or moisturise with our wide range of hair care products. We would love to hear your thoughts! If you enjoyed using this product, please share a review. Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, our exclusive shampoo formula gives your hair more body and bounce. Biotin for hair? Yes! Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk shampoo comes in.

With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

Simply massage Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo onto wet hair, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for longer and healthier-looking hair. Use together with our Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner to give your hair the body and bounce to turn heads.

TRESemme's Nourish & Shine Shampoo is formulated to suit all hair types. Our shampoo, enriched with vitamin E and hemp seed oil, enhances the natural shine of your hair while providing deep hydration where it's needed most. This shampoo is gentle enough for daily use and is free of parabens, alcohol and dyes. It delivers intense hydration, leaving your hair looking and feeling healthy and nourished. Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve gorgeous hair every day. These salon-quality formulas come without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. Bottles are made in Australia, with Australian recycled plastic and are recyclable. Directions: after shampooing with TRESemme Nourish & Shine, apply conditioner through your hair. Run a wide-tooth comb or fingers from roots to tips to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly and style with your favourite TRESemme products. For more secrets from our professional stylists and details on TRESemme styling appliances and tools, visit our website. Get professional quality at your fingertips.

long_description:
Did you know that hair is 90% protein? Daily damage strips this protein away, leading to weakened hair that is more prone to breakage. That's why Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo is formulated with patented Bio-Protein Care technology, backed by 10 years of research. Part of our Damage Therapy system, this shampoo protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage. Apply to wet hair, gently lather, rinse and follow with Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Conditioner. Enjoy stronger hair and up to 25x less breakage*. At Dove, we believe no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, we've been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we'll have helped a quarter of a billion through our educational programs and resources. *When using Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo.

  • Get up to 25x less breakage* with Dove Damage Therapy Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo

  • Designed to strengthen weakened hair prone to breakage

  • This shampoo features Bio-Protein Care technology backed by 10 years of research

  • Protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage

  • Follow with Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Conditioner for best results

  • Our shampoos are PETA-Approved Vegan and we do not test on animals anywhere in the world.

long_description:
TRESemme Keratin Smooth Conditioner detangles and rehydrates dry, frizzy hair, leaving it looking silky soft. As part of the TRESemme Pro Collection Keratin Smooth range, it's never been easier to say goodbye to flyaways and hello to frizz-free hair. The TRESemme Keratin Smooth three-step range is enriched with keratin and has numerous benefits, leaving your locks looking and feeling soft and shiny. Our conditioner delivers frizz control, detangles and reduces flyaways while adding heat protection, a soft shine and luxurious smoothness. This lightweight formula adds movement for easy styling, and features our Pro Style technology to leave your hair strong and manageable over continued use. For best results, use the complete range to achieve beautifully shiny, soft hair.

This conditioner is Step 2 in our Keratin Smooth range. Directions: apply to wet hair. Leave for 2-3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Follow with our Keratin Smooth Serum in Step 3. Get salon-quality hair at home with the TRESemme Pro Collection range.

Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality haircare products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve salon-gorgeous hair every day. These are salon-quality formulas without the high price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, go to our website.
  • TRESemme Keratin Smooth Conditioner provides 10-in-1 benefits, detangling and rehydrating frizzy hair, leaving it shiny, smooth and silky soft

  • This rich conditioner provides frizz control and detangling, adding shine and softness, with heat protection to reduce flyaways - all in a lightweight formula that ensures movement for easy styling

  • TRESemme's Pro Style technology works from the inside out to leave damaged hair strong and manageable over continued use

  • Our professional-quality hair conditioner contains no dyes, alcohol or parabens

  • For best results, use Keratin Smooth Conditioner as part of your TRESemme Keratin Smooth haircare routine, after shampooing and before applying our serum

  • Our nourishing conditioner strengthens dry and frizzy hair, is made in Australia and is PETA approved.

Let Sunsilk Coconut Hydration Shampoo be your solution to dry and dull hair. Its exclusive formula is enriched with coconut oil and aloe vera to deeply moisturise each hair strand. The result? Beautifully scented hair that feels nourished from root to tip**!

Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk Coconut Hydration Shampoo comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover.

Simply massage Sunsilk Coconut Hydration Shampoo onto wet hair, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, use daily with our Coconut Hydration Conditioner.

long_description:
Did you know that hair is made of 90% protein? Daily damage strips this protein away. That's why Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo is formulated with patented Bio-Protein Care technology, backed by 10 years of research. The technology delivers 1 trillion molecules of a key amino acid, the same amino acid that makes up the protein most lost due to hair damage. This helps repair the hair from the inside, leaving hair stronger, smoother and healthier-looking with every wash. Part of our Damage Therapy system, this shampoo protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage. Made with glutamic amino serum, the formula works at a molecular level to repair damaged hair and deeply nourish its natural structure, resulting in 10x stronger hair fibres*. Apply to wet hair, gently lather and rinse. For best results, follow with Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Conditioner, Mask and Serum. At Dove, we believe no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, we've been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we'll have helped a quarter of a billion through our educational programs and resources. *When using Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Conditioner and Shampoo for damaged hair vs non-conditioning shampoo.

  • Get up to 10x stronger hair* with Dove Damage Therapy Intensive Repair + Ceramide Shampoo

  • Made with glutamic amino serum, a key amino acid naturally found in hair

  • This shampoo for damaged hair features Bio-Protein Care technology backed by 10 years of research

  • Protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage

  • Follow with Dove Intensive Repair + Ceramide Conditioner, Mask and Serum for best results against hair damage

  • Our hair care products are PETA-Approved Vegan and we do not test on animals anywhere in the world.
name: Damage Therapy Shampoo Intensive Repair

long_description:
Did you know that hair is made of 90% protein? Daily damage strips this protein away, leading to weakened hair that is more prone to breakage. That's why Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Conditioner is formulated with patented Bio-Protein Care technology, backed by 10 years of research. The technology delivers 1 trillion molecules of a key amino acid, the same amino acid that makes up the protein most lost due to damage. This helps repair the hair from the inside, leaving hair stronger, smoother and healthier-looking with every wash. Part of our Damage Therapy system, this conditioner protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage. After shampooing with Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo, apply and massage, leave on for 1 min and rinse. Enjoy stronger hair and up to 25x less breakage*. At Dove, we believe no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, we've been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we'll have helped a quarter of a billion through our educational programs and resources. *When using Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo.

  • Get up to 25x less breakage* with Dove Damage Therapy Bond Strength + Biotin Conditioner

  • Designed to strengthen weakened hair prone to breakage

  • This conditioner features Bio-Protein Care technology backed by 10 years of research

  • Protects, repairs and restores hair to reduce signs of damage

  • Use with Dove Bond Strength + Biotin Shampoo for best results

  • Our conditioners are PETA-Approved Vegan and we do not test on animals anywhere in the world.

long_description:
TRESemme's Volume & Fullness Conditioner is specially formulated for fine and thin hair. Enriched with multi-vitamins and coconut oil, this lightweight formula helps build volume, fullness and lift for 24-hour body. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this conditioner rinses out completely without build-up for a weightless salon-fresh style.

For best results, use after shampooing with TRESemme Volume & Fullness Shampoo. Apply through hair, running a wide tooth comb or fingers from root to tip to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly before styling with your favourite TRESemme products.

Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, the products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. long_description:
TRESemme's Nourish & Shine Conditioner is formulated to suit all hair types. Our conditioner, enriched with vitamin E and hemp seed oil, enhances the natural shine of your hair while providing deep hydration where it's needed most. This conditioner is gentle enough for daily use and is free of parabens, alcohol and dyes. It delivers intense hydration, leaving your hair looking and feeling healthy and nourished. Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how a great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve gorgeous salon-look hair every day. These salon-quality formulas come without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. Bottles are made in Australia, with Australian recycled plastic and are recyclable. Directions: after shampooing with TRESemme Nourish & Shine, apply conditioner through your hair. Run a wide-tooth comb or fingers from roots to tips to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly and style with your favourite TRESemme products. For more secrets from our professional stylists and details on TRESemme styling appliances and tools, visit our website. Get professional quality at your fingertips. Can cause eye irritation. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water.
  • TRESemme's Nourish & Shine Conditioner enhances the natural shine of your hair and provides deep hydration

  • TRESemme's Nourish & Shine Conditioner is made for all hair types

  • Enriched with vitamin E and hemp seed oil to hydrate hair and leave it salon soft

  • Our professional-quality conditioner contains no parabens, alcohol or dyes

  • For best results, use after shampooing with TRESemme Nourish & Shine Shampoo

  • Our Nourish & Shine conditioner is made in Australia and PETA approved.
name: Conditioner Nourish & Shine
